basics.name: Mark L F Tlau
basics.title: SysAdmin | IT Operations | Fullstack Developer
basics.bio: I architect secure, highly available IT infrastructure and build high-performance web applications. Bridging the gap between writing clean code and running reliable servers. Specializing in Linux administration, container orchestration, and fullstack TypeScript/Go development.

expertise.title: Systems Administration
expertise.description: Deployment and maintenance of Linux servers. Proficient in Active Directory, user provisioning, and automated disaster recovery.

expertise.title: Fullstack Web Development
expertise.description: Building custom web apps and PWAs. Focused on rapid client-side rendering with SvelteKit/Next.js and secure backend APIs.

expertise.title: Network Engineering
expertise.description: Design of secure networks, VLAN segmentation, reverse proxies (Caddy), and encrypted VPN tunnels (Tailscale/WireGuard).

projects.title: High-Availability Container Cluster
projects.description: Architected a secure, multi-tenant deployment environment bypassing CGNAT. Utilized Docker and Caddy for automated SSL provisioning and zero-trust proxying.

projects.title: Peekaboo Watch-Party
projects.description: A WebRTC watch-party clone with persistent chat. Engineered as a mobile-first PWA with a Firebase backend for low-latency peer-to-peer media synchronization.
